name: the honest-scope caveat appears within the first twenty lines of /space-report output (not buried at the end)
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics: []
' > space/metrics.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-report.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml --config space/config.yaml > out.txt 2>err.txt && head -20 out.txt | grep -q 'solo-scale self-observation' && echo ok 1>&2
